name: OFAC SLS API
description: Calls the OFAC Sanctions List Service API. Use this tool to screen parties in real-time against OFAC sanctions data. Supports three actions: SEARCH_ENTITY (search by entityId, listName, or programName), DOWNLOAD_SDN (download SDN_ENHANCED.XML or other OFAC list files for full-list screening), and GET_CHANGES (check for latest OFAC list updates). Call SEARCH_ENTITY for every party in the input using the party's full legal name and aliases. Call DOWNLOAD_SDN when deep identifier matching is needed from the enhanced XML data.
